_doc: Data-change payload contract associated with stage 13 completion, promotion, and broadcast events. Validated against createDataChangePayload(), emitDataChange(), and runFinalizationTelemetryPhase() on 2026-03-17.

payload_shape.domains: Domain group derived from event or explicit callsite domains.
payload_shape.entities: productIds[] and fieldKeys[] extracted from payload and meta.
payload_shape.meta: Callsite-specific extra context with undefined values removed.

stage13_event_sources: runFinalizationTelemetryPhase emits finalization event payloads for needSet, prime sources, phase08 extraction, and indexing schema packets.
Promotion and publishing flows emit data-change notifications through broadcastWs-aware call sites.
Entity extraction is additive: meta.productId, meta.fields, and explicit entities are merged.
